name: control-switchbot-devices-via-api
description: Control and query SwitchBot devices using the official OpenAPI (v1.1). Use when the user asks to list SwitchBot devices, get device status, or send commands (turn on/off, press, set mode, lock/unlock, curtain open %, IR air conditioner, lights, fans, robot vacuums, keypads, etc.…
author: community
